tools.name: security_decode_jwt
tools.description:
Use this when you need to decode and inspect a JWT token without verifying its signature. Returns the full header, payload, and expiration status.

1. header -- algorithm (RS256, HS256, etc.) and token type
2. payload -- all claims (sub, iss, aud, iat, exp, custom claims)
3. issuedAt -- human-readab

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "security_decode_jwt" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
